历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 10609 → 8417 → 6768 → 7584 → 6598, showing a fluctuating upward trend overall. The 2025 baseline is about 6598, with rankings fluctuating between 6600 and 7600 in recent two years. The university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Shaanxi was 59 in 2021, 60 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 57 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 81, an expansion of about 42%, notably increasing admission opportunities and significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 40 and 43 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 group. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident raising campus safety concerns, which may mildly suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall rank 45), with moderate to high short video exposure and acceptable attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. System Science A+, Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, with 6 A- and above disciplines. Information and transportation disciplines are outstanding, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 2025 (172,468), expanding the competition base. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6598, the significant 42% enrollment expansion in 2026 increasing admission opportunities, the approximately 19.7% increase in local Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, and the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing application enthusiasm, the expansion effect dominates but is partially offset by candidate growth. It is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly shift backward to about 8215 compared to 2025; the predicted range is 7715–8715.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 8215, with a range of 7715–8715. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<7715), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors like the Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class and Computer Science Category. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>8715), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and strive to enter the university.
